title: Manager, Property & Facilities Management (Retail Mall)
description:
Our client is a Property Industry. Due to their current expansion plan, they are looking for Manager, Property & Facilities Management to join their team, in hopes of developing the current high performing team. They are located in the Central.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Lead and manage the property and facilities operations team to achieve performance KPIs.

  • Oversee property operations and facilities management for assigned REIT and MCST strata areas.

  • Manage M&E systems, fire safety compliance, and statutory requirements.

  • Lead and support special projects including feasibility studies, reconfiguration works, and asset enhancement initiatives.

  • Oversee upgrading and replacement works for building M&E systems.

  • Manage outsourced service providers (security, cleaning, facilities contractors) to ensure service quality and cost efficiency.

  • Prepare and manage operational budgets and capital expenditure forecasts.

  • Ensure effective planning and execution of preventive, corrective, and reactive maintenance programmes.

  • Act as first responder during emergencies and ensure timely issue resolution.

  • Ensure compliance with house rules, operational standards, and regulatory requirements.

Job Requirements:

  • Degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical), Building, Facilities Management, or equivalent qualification.
  • Minimum 15 years of relevant hands-on experience in M&E building systems and mixed-use property management.
  • Experienced manage Retail or Shopping Mall.
  • Strong knowledge of BCA Green Mark requirements and sustainability standards.
  • Sound experience in tenant management, building maintenance, technical services, and construction works.
  • Proven leadership and project management capabilities, including budgeting and forecasting.
  • Hands-on, proactive, and solution-oriented with strong problem-solving skills.
  • Ability to multitask and work independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Fire Safety Manager certification is an added advantage.
  • Green Mark Manager certification will be an advantage.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click APPLY NOW or email an updated copy of your resume/cv.

We regret that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

Recruitpedia Pte. Ltd.
